prompt:
Declaration (in prose format):

Define a research_assistant agent. The framing question is "should we
acquire competitor X?" and the decision is needed by 2026-06-15. The agent
has access to financials.pdf, 10K.pdf, and press.html, plus search and
calculator tools. The behavior is: in parallel, spawn three subagents — one
named "market" to assess size and growth using market docs, one named
"legal" to assess antitrust risk using legal docs, and one named "finance"
to build a valuation model using the financials. Then synthesize their
outputs into a decision memo. Lyndon reviews as a human in the loop. The
final output is a 2-page markdown document.

Output a flat bullet list manifest of every concrete element this declaration implies.
manifest:
• Agent name: research_assistant
• Framing question: "should we acquire competitor X?"
• Decision deadline: 2026-06-15
• Input file: financials.pdf
• Input file: 10K.pdf
• Input file: press.html
• Tool: search
• Tool: calculator
• Subagent name: market
• Subagent task: assess market size and growth
• Subagent input source: market docs
• Subagent name: legal
• Subagent task: assess antitrust risk
• Subagent input source: legal docs
• Subagent name: finance
• Subagent task: build a valuation model
• Subagent input source: financials
• Subagent execution mode: parallel (all three spawned simultaneously)
• Step: synthesize outputs from market, legal, and finance subagents
• Synthesis output type: decision memo
• Human-in-the-loop reviewer: Lyndon
• Final output format: markdown document
• Final output length: 2 pages
